speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] G'day everyone and welcome to ParkSyde Bright Side! I'm Alex Mercer, and we're bringing you all the good news that matters this Tuesday, April 14th. It's another beautiful autumn day here in Southeast Queensland, and mate, we've got some absolutely brilliant stories to share with you today.

speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] And I'm Jamie, absolutely buzzing to be here! We've got some incredible breakthroughs happening around the world - from cutting-edge brain science that's going to change everything, to environmental wins that'll make you smile. Plus, we'll check in on how our markets are holding up despite all the global uncertainty.

speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] Too right, Jamie! And you know what? Sometimes the world feels a bit heavy, but that's exactly why we do what we do here at ParkSyde Bright Side. There's always something amazing happening when you know where to look for it. Let's dive into the good stuff, shall we?
